No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or learning outcomes supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or learning outcomes supports contributions to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or learning outcomes supports contributions to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a required university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly trains critical thinking, logical analysis, and discernment of truth (Target 4.4, 4.7).
evidence: 訓練同學堅實的邏輯推論能力
為日後分析事理或學術研究奠定良好基礎
批判思考及論辯反思能力

Gender Equality.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or learning outcomes supports contributions to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or learning outcomes supports contributions to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or learning outcomes supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops foundational critical thinking and analytical skills, which are indirectly relevant for future employment and academic research (Target 8.5).
evidence: 批判思考及論辯反思能力
為日後分析事理或學術研究奠定良好基礎

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course states logic 'included all the basic concepts and principles of science,' providing foundational skills for scientific research and technological capabilities (Target 9.5).
evidence: 邏輯包含了所有科學的基本觀念和原理

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The ability to logically analyze arguments and discern right from wrong in 'social issues' can indirectly help identify and challenge discriminatory practices (Target 10.3).
evidence: 分析各主張背後的論據

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or learning outcomes supports contributions to responsible consumption and production.

Climate Action.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or learning outcomes supports contributions to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or learning outcomes supports contributions to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or learning outcomes supports contributions to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course cultivates logical analysis, critical thinking, and the ability to discern right from wrong, directly supporting effective, accountable institutions and the rule of law (Targets 16.3, 16.6).
